summary: PSP layout controls outside field; hazard overlaps/crowds top status band near mode text

issues.detail: Red triangle hazard sits in the upper field near the CLASSIC|NORMAL status line (same class of HUD/world z-layout clash as phone_landscape).

usability_notes: Stick L / DASH R outside blue rect; single border; entities mostly in-bounds; Score/hearts legible. Control chrome does not crowd field interior. Same landscape status-band vulnerability as other phone landscape cells.
